description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a widescreen display, featuring a thin black bezel that frames the screen. The display is shown powered on, with a recognizable Windows operating system background visible. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, circular pedestal stand that connects to the center of the lower bezel, providing stability. The bezel has rounded corners and a smooth, matte finish, with a small circular button and a power indicator light located centrally below the screen. The rear of the monitor is plain and unadorned, with no visible ports or branding. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for contemporary office or public urban environments.
description: A sleek, widescreen computer monitor with a thin black bezel, circular pedestal stand, and a powered-on display showing a Windows background. The design is modern and minimalistic, with a central button and indicator light below the screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the widescreen display, thin black bezel, circular stand, and a Windows background with a central button and indicator light below the screen.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the round, sturdy pedestal stand; the screen and bezel thickness are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the monitor and the circular base, with no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slimness of the monitor and the connection between the screen and the round base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has rounded corners with a smooth, matte finish. It is uniform in width and features a small circular button and indicator light at the center of the bottom bezel.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a circular pedestal type, made of black plastic or metal, with a wide, flat base for stability and a central vertical support connecting to the monitor.
attribute_button_placement: A single circular button and indicator light are located centrally on the bottom bezel, directly below the screen.
